newsletterSuccess: Your subscription to eeMe's mailing list has been confirmed.

subscribeActivities: Subscribe to stay up to date with eeMe's latest news and activities
onBoardingTitle: LET’S BUILD YOUR TALENT MEDIA KIT / ONLINE PORTFOLIO FOR FREE
onBoardingDescription: If you're an actor, a singer, content creator, songwriter, filmmaker, media personality, athlete, or an expert in your field, we can help you quickly create a media kit and online portfolio on the eeMe platform at zero cost. Save time and money.
onBoardingNote: *Once you register and enter your information in the required fields, the eeMe team will review your application. We typically go over profiles within 24 hours, although in some cases, it may take longer. You will receive status updates via email.
onBoardingStep1: Get your all-in-one digital portfolio and showcase content from ALL your online platforms
onBoardingStep2: Be part of the eeMe community
onBoardingStep3: Grab the attention of brands who are looking for talents/artists like yourself
onBoardingStep4: Easy setup. We will help you go live in less than 10 minutes
onBoardingStep5: No hidden fees, no commissions. You have full control of your portfolio. And IT’S FREE FOREVER!
onBoardingTitle2: SHOW OFF YOUR ALL-IN-ONE PORTFOLIO TO BRANDS AND  FANS
onBoardingFormOtherSocial: Any other social media account url
onBoardingFormFollowers: How many followers/subscribers do you have?
onBoardingTechnologies: eeMe TECHNOLOGIES ALLOW YOU TO TAKE CONTROL OF YOUR CAREER
onBoardingPMedia_1: Your own online media kit / website
onBoardingPBooking_1: Everything in Talents’ Media Kit, plus:
onBoardingPBooking_2: Booking or e-commerce functionality, sell anything on your website
onBoardingPInsight_1: Everything In TALENTS’ BOOKING ENGINE, Plus:
onBoardingTalentQuote: "We’ve created this technology to empower talents by giving them an all-in-one platform to showcase their portfolio. We help you open the doors to greater opportunities for brand collaboration and career growth. Focus on your talent, we\'ll focus on your digital space.”
notifyAlertMessage: Thank you. You'll be notified as soon as talent is available
bookPersonalizedVideoTitle: {{talent}} has {{responseTime}} days to complete the video. Your receipt and order updates will be sent to the email provided under Delivery Information. When your request is completed, we'll email a link to view, share, or download your eeMe. If for some reason your video isn't completed, the ${{price}} will be refunded.
requestCampaignDescription: The brief should explicitly state campaign objectives, expectations, guidelines and deliverables so that the potential talent or content creator will have all the necessary details prior to collaboration. This will ensure that the artist/content creator and your brand goals are aligned. It will also boost your chances of a successful marketing campaign. To ensure a smooth process, here is a glimpse of what an exceptional marketing brief should include:

form.name: Name
